name: AREthGetDestinationAddress
title: AREthGetDestinationAddress
syntax: long AREthGetDestinationAddress ( dword messageHandle, byte ipv6Address[] ); // form 2
description: This function returns the IPv4 destination address.

parameters.name: Note This function can only be called within the OnAREthMessage callback function.
ipv6Address
parameters.description: The parameter to which the IPv6 address will be written to.

return:
IPv4 destination address (Network Byte Order)
In the Event of an error, the function returns the value 0. The AREthGetLastError function can then be used to check whether the value is valid or an error has occurred.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
